data.title: Dr. Kevin Rhodes, OFPP Administrator, to speak at NCMA Nexus 2026 on federal procurement. Keynote address.
data.description: Reston, Virginia - On December 11, 2025, the National Contract Management Association (NCMA) shared that Dr. Kevin Rhodes, the Administrator of the Office of Federal Procurement Policy (OFPP), will be a keynote speaker at the upcoming NCMA Nexus 2026 event. Dr. Rhodes, a prominent figure in the industry, will present during the event.

data.title: CEO warns enterprises aren't maximizing AI potential; pockets of success among overall noise.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has hit a record low of 3.8%, with 200,000 new jobs created in the last month. Additionally, the stock market has surged, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 30,000 points. Experts believe that the strong job market and robust economy are contributing to this positive trend. The government has announced plans to invest $1 billion in infrastructure projects to further boost economic growth. This news has been welcomed by investors and policymakers alike.

data.title: Gerosynth Labs receives acceptance for INAD in equine, feline, and canine oncology from FDA CVM.
data.description: In Bloomington, Minnesota on December 11, 2025, Gerosynth Labs, Inc. revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration Center for Veterinary Medicine (CVM) has approved various new medications. Gerosynth Labs, Inc. is a leading biotech company specializing in innovative treatments for cancer and cellular health. The news marks a significant step for the company as it continues to develop cutting-edge solutions in these fields.

data.title: LandBridge partners with Samsung C&T Renewables for BESS projects in Texas, leasing acreage for 350MW capacity.
data.description: LandBridge Company LLC disclosed today that it has signed development agreements with Samsung C&T Renewables, LLC (SCTR) granting the option to lease land for two proposed Battery Energy Storage System projects in Pecos and Loving counties, Texas. These projects have a combined capacity of 350 MW. The agreements confer exclusive rights to SCTR for each site.

data.title: Global Payments Inc released its 2026 Commerce and Payment Trends Report, the sixth-annual report. (Characters: 99)
data.description: Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN) has recently unveiled its Commerce and Payment Trends Report for the sixth consecutive year. The report sheds light on the latest trends in commerce and payment methods.

data.title: Amentum wins $3.5B contract with DTRA for threat reduction services globally as part of CTRIC IV.
data.description: Amentum, a notable company (NYSE: AMTM) specializing in advanced engineering and technology services, has been chosen as a prime contractor for the DTRA's Cooperative Threat Reduction Integrating Contract (CTRIC) IV, valued at $3.5 billion. The contract entails delivering sustainable solutions for chemical, biological, radiological, and nuclear threat reduction to various partner nations globally. Amentum is one of six awardees selected to contribute to this critical initiative. The company's commitment to the project remains unwavering.

data.title: Sen-Jam Pharmaceutical partners with TASK Clinical to fund two-thirds of Phase 3 trial for SJP-001, reducing risks.
data.description: Investment from equity partners has significantly reduced the risks associated with a crucial program and has increased the attractiveness of licensing opportunities for Sen-Jam Pharmaceutical. This will also enhance the company's preparedness for commercialization. The announcement was made in Huntington, N.Y., on Dec. 11, 2025.

data.title: CNLABS gets ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation for EU cybersecurity standards, aiding compliance with RED and IoT rules.
data.description: CNLABS, a prominent player in network interoperability and security testing, revealed their EU Readiness Program on Dec. 11, 2025, in Sunnyvale, California. The program is bolstered by their recent accreditation with ISO/IEC 17025 which aligns with Radio Equipment Directive (RED) and IoT standards. This accreditation signifies their commitment to compliance with regulatory requirements. Established as a global leader, CNLABS aims to ensure robust adherence to standards, positioning themselves as a reliable entity in the industry.

data.title: Ledgible introduces CARF & DAC8 Transaction Engine for digital asset tax reporting, a first in the industry.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Atlanta, a company called Ledgible introduced their Configurable CARF & DAC8 Data Engine software. This platform is aimed at managing digital-asset tax, accounting, and data reporting in enterprises. It is the first of its kind in the industry and is designed to convert unprocessed blockchain data.

data.title: ACORD reveals winner of 2025 Student Challenge for AI innovation in insurance data, empowering students in national comp.
data.description: In New York on December 11, 2025, ACORD revealed the champion of the ACORD Student Challenge 2025, a groundbreaking nationwide contest allowing college students to utilize advanced technology for enhancing practical insurance procedures. The latest iteration of the challenge resulted in...

data.title: Mars acquires Kellanova, adding Pringles, Cheez-It, and other brands to its portfolio. Shapes future of snacking.
data.description: Mars, Incorporated, a prominent global company in pet care, snacking, and food, has confirmed the finalization of its acquisition of Kellanova. This acquisition includes popular brands such as Pringles, Cheez-It, Pop-Tarts, Rice Krispies Treats, RXBAR, and Kellogg's international cereal brands. By merging these two renowned companies, Mars and Kellanova unite their cherished brands, rich histories, and exceptional strengths. This acquisition is set to play a significant role in shaping the future of snacking.

data.title: Ciena's stock hits 52-week high with record Q4 results: $1.35 billion revenue, 20.3% YoY growth, 91 cents EPS beats estimates. AI demand propels growth.
data.description: Shares of Ciena Corporation (CIEN) surged after the company released its fiscal Q4 2025 results, showcasing a remarkable 20.3% year-on-year revenue growth to $1.35 billion. This figure exceeded analysts' expectations of $1.29 billion. Moreover, their adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at 91 cents, surpassing the projected 77 cents. Ciena primarily generates revenue via networking hardware sales, with some contributions from software and services. The significant demand comes from major cloud and telecom providers seeking high-speed connectivity for AI infrastructure. CEO anticipates robust growth in 2026.
TIME MAGAZINE NAMES 'ARCHITECTS OF AI' AS PERSON OF THE YEAR

data.title: Bybit offers personalized annual recap of traders' journey in 2025. 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, as of December 11, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, has introduced a new feature for users to access a personalized yearly summary of their trading activities on the platform. This recap option allows users to review their individual trading journey on Bybit as the year 2025 comes to an end. This enhancement offers insights into personal trading statistics and achievements throughout the year.

data.title: Massimo Group to showcase new MVR HVAC Pro Series at 2026 PGA Show in Orlando with climate-controlled electric vehicles.
data.description: A company based in Garland, Texas, Massimo Group, revealed plans to showcase its latest MVR HVAC Pro Series at the upcoming 2026 PGA Show in Orlando, Florida. Known for manufacturing and distributing powersports and electric vehicles, Massimo Group, listed on NASDAQ as MAMO, will introduce this innovative product line at the event. The debut of the MVR HVAC Pro Series is highly anticipated and marks an exciting development in the industry's evolution.

data.title: SLB partners with Shell to create digital, AI solutions for energy industry. Aim to enhance efficiency and performance.
data.description: Houston-based energy technology firm SLB, listed on NYSE as SLB, has recently partnered with Shell to form a strategic collaboration focusing on digital and AI innovations. This partnership aims to enhance operational efficiency in upstream operations for both companies as well as the broader industry. The goal of this collaboration is to create AI-powered solutions that will empower technical professionals and decision-makers. The objective is to establish an open data platform to drive performance improvements.

data.title: By 2027, YouTube TV expected to become top US pay-TV operator, surpassing Charter and Comcast - Omdia report.
data.description: In London, YouTube TV is making waves in the US television industry. Omdia predicts that by 2027, YouTube TV will overtake Charter and Comcast to become the leading pay-TV provider in the United States. This milestone marks the first instance of a virtual pay-TV service taking the top spot in the market. Omdia's analysis showcases the rapid growth of YouTube TV and its increasing presence in the traditional pay-TV sector. This shift in the US Pay-TV landscape reflects the evolving preferences of consumers towards digital streaming services.

data.title: Toshiba introduces new mobile solutions for retailers like Away with TCx® M7 and TCx® M11 to enhance connected experiences.
data.description: Toshiba introduces its latest mobile solutions, the TCx® M7 and TCx® M11, in Research Triangle Park, N.C. These innovative products aim to provide retailers with connected technology that improves customer experiences at various touchpoints.

data.title: Karbon Capital Partners Corp. prices $300M IPO with 30M units at $10 each, listing on Nasdaq.
data.description: In Scranton, Pennsylvania on December 11, 2025, Karbon Capital Partners Corp. revealed the details of its initial public offering, consisting of 30,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit. These units are set to be listed on The Nasdaq Global Market for trading.
